//: Known, PRE-EXISTING schema drift (T2). These tables/columns exist in the
//2: production D1 — they were added by out-of-band ALTERs (see migration
//3: 011a's note: 'deliverable_url was applied in a previous out-of-band
//4: deploy') — but the committed migrations never create them, so a FRESH
//5: database built only from /migrations would lack them. The CI drift check
//6: tolerates exactly these identifiers so it can still FAIL on any NEW drift.
//7: To shrink this list, add the missing columns/tables in a migration and
//8: remove them here. Do NOT add new entries to silence a real bug.
